requirements.requirement: Provider telemetry aggregation deterministically computes latency, error rate, timeout rate, estimated token usage, cache usage, estimated cost, and safe workflow, Quick Consult, Party Mode, and provider groupings.

cases: [P0][6.2-UNIT-001][AC1,AC3] deterministically aggregates fake provider completed failed and retried telemetry
[P0][6.2-UNIT-001B][AC1] treats HTTP 408 provider failures as timeout failures
[P0][6.2-UNIT-002][AC1,AC3] computes cache usage without double counting provider tokens or cost
[P0][6.2-UNIT-003][AC1] groups metrics by workflow Quick Consult Party Mode and provider from safe metadata
[P1][6.2-API-007][AC1] returns the data envelope and delegates current tenant date workflow and grouping filters
[P1][6.2-API-014][AC1,AC2] serves GET /advisory/admin/operations/provider-telemetry as aggregate-only data
[P1][6.2-INT-007][AC1,AC2] queries only registered provider and prompt cache telemetry rows by row tenant date and event names

heuristics.endpoint_coverage: Covered by controller metadata/direct ATDD and a real Nest HTTP route test for aggregate-only provider telemetry output.
heuristics.auth_authz_coverage: Route-level guard/tenant negative paths are covered after review hardening.
heuristics.error_path_coverage: Timeout, cache mismatch, unavailable source, malformed telemetry, unsafe metadata, wrong version, invalid dates, and max window paths are covered.

requirements.requirement: Aggregator accepts only versioned provider/cache telemetry events from the Story 1.4 registry and rejects malformed, unversioned, wrong-version, unknown, or privacy-unsafe events as traceable instrumentation gaps.

cases: [P0][6.2-UNIT-004][AC2] rejects unknown unversioned malformed wrong version and privacy unsafe rows as instrumentation gaps
[P1][6.2-UNIT-005][AC2] surfaces delayed freshness and source unavailable states instead of trusted zero-only metrics
[P0][6.2-UNIT-006][AC2] enforces service-level tenant scope and maximum query window before reading rows
[P1][6.2-API-006][AC1,AC2] exposes provider telemetry endpoint behind admin guards and role metadata
[P1][6.2-API-008][AC2] rejects foreign tenant and malformed date windows before querying telemetry
[P1][6.2-API-009][AC2] passes through unavailable freshness and never returns raw telemetry details
[P1][6.2-API-014][AC1,AC2] serves GET /advisory/admin/operations/provider-telemetry as aggregate-only data
[P0][6.2-API-015][AC2] rejects foreign tenant provider telemetry filters before reading rows
[P1][6.2-API-016][AC2] rejects malformed provider telemetry date and grouping filters at the route
[P1][6.2-API-017][AC2] returns unavailable provider telemetry freshness when the source fails
[P1][6.2-API-018][AC2] returns 401 before serving anonymous provider telemetry requests
[P1][6.2-API-019][AC2] returns 403 when role guard denies provider telemetry access
[P1][6.2-INT-007][AC1,AC2] queries only registered provider and prompt cache telemetry rows by row tenant date and event names
[P1][6.2-INT-008][AC2] defaults to the Story 6.2 provider telemetry whitelist and orders rows deterministically

heuristics.endpoint_coverage: Provider telemetry route has positive, validation, unavailable, tenant denial, anonymous, and role denial coverage.
heuristics.auth_authz_coverage: JwtAuthGuard, TenantGuard, RolesGuard metadata and real HTTP 401/403/foreign-tenant paths are covered.
heuristics.error_path_coverage: Malformed date, invalid date-only, repeated date query, invalid groupBy, oversized date window, unavailable source, unsafe payload, tenant mismatch, and unsafe dimension paths are covered.

requirements.requirement: Automated tests use fake provider telemetry to compute deterministic cost, latency, cache, and failure summaries without live GLM calls.

cases: [P0][6.2-UNIT-001][AC1,AC3] deterministically aggregates fake provider completed failed and retried telemetry
[P0][6.2-UNIT-002][AC1,AC3] computes cache usage without double counting provider tokens or cost
ATDD generation explicitly selected backend fake telemetry fixtures and 0 browser/live GLM tests for Story 6.2.

heuristics.endpoint_coverage: Not applicable to the no-live-provider test constraint.
heuristics.auth_authz_coverage: Not applicable to fake provider determinism.
heuristics.error_path_coverage: Failure, retry, timeout, cache miss, cache bypass, and inconsistent cache event fixtures are deterministic in unit/ATDD coverage.

recommendations.action: Keep Story 6.2 provider telemetry, route, and audit-log query suites in the Epic 6 regression set.
